connect wallet

MINT CATS on
Mint BLOCKCHAIN

Mint Cats is a special collaboration between Mint Blockchain and Smart Layer to provide an opportunity to participate in the Mint Blockchain airdrop.
50,000 Mint Cats available to mint.

Check Eligibility

How It Works

[
Exclusive to Smart Cats
20k Available
]

20,000 Mint Cats are reserved for Smart Cat holders.

Verify your assets on Smart Layer Launchpad to be eligible to claim 1 of 20,000 Mint Cats.Verification will commence on 15/07/2024. Minting will commence on 25/07/2024

[
Open to everyone
30k Available
]

30,000 Mint Cats are available to anyone on a first come first serve basis through a public mint.

Claim 1 of 30,000 Mint Cats when public mint opens on 25/07/2024.

[
Level up for airdrop
]

Mint Cats is a playable token with a minimum number of levels to reach in order to be eligible for Mint airdrop.

[
Exclusive to Smart Cats
20k Available
]

20,000 Mint Cats are reserved for Smart Cat holders.

Verify your assets on Smart Layer Launchpad to be eligible to claim 1 of 20,000 Mint Cats.Verification will commence on 15/07/2024. Minting will commence on 25/07/2024

[
Open to everyone
30k Available
]

30,000 Mint Cats are available to anyone on a first come first serve basis through a public mint.

Claim 1 of 30,000 Mint Cats when public mint opens on 25/07/2024.

[
Level up for airdrop
]

Mint Cats is a playable token with a minimum number of levels to reach in order to be eligible for Mint airdrop.
